disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden severe, unremitting pounding headache over the past few hours, not relieved by an over-the-counter anti-inflammatory
trigger_question_examples: When did the headache start and how bad is it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It came on over the last few hours and it is the worst pounding headache I can remember — I took an ibuprofen and it did absolutely nothing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Transient blurred vision lasting about 15 minutes, with ongoing dizziness and ringing in the ears
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any changes in your vision?
Any dizziness, spinning or ringing in your ears?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My vision went blurry for about 15 minutes then came back, the room keeps spinning, and my ears are ringing loudly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No one-sided weakness, facial droop, slurred speech or numbness reported at present
trigger_question_examples: Any weakness or drooping on one side of your face or body?
Is your speech slurred or are you struggling to find words?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my face and arms feel even on both sides and my speech is normal — it's mainly the headache, the spinning and my vision.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Bright red, flushed (ruddy) complexion and markedly bloodshot eyes
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe how your face and eyes look?
Has your colour changed at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My face is bright red and feels like it's on fire, and the whites of my eyes are really bloodshot.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Intense generalised itching triggered specifically by warm-water contact (showers), lasting up to an hour afterward
trigger_question_examples: Do you get any itching, and is anything setting it off?
Does water or showering affect your skin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — after a warm shower I get unbearable itching all over that lasts nearly an hour. It's been happening for months.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Burning pain with bright redness and warmth of the palms and soles
trigger_question_examples: Any pain, colour change or burning in your hands or feet?
Do your hands or feet ever go red and hot?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My palms and the soles of my feet burn and go bright red and feel hot.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A constant feeling of fullness or heaviness in the upper left abdomen
trigger_question_examples: Any fullness, discomfort or swelling in your tummy?
Have you noticed any heaviness on the left side of your abdomen?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's a constant full, heavy feeling in the upper left side of my belly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Six months of progressive fatigue, lethargy and reduced exercise tolerance
trigger_question_examples: How have you been feeling in yourself over recent months?
Any change in your energy or stamina?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been getting more and more worn out and short of puff over the last six months.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone with no one else present; unable to stand because of the dizziness and headache
trigger_question_examples: Is anyone with you right now?
Are you able to stand or move around safely?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm on my own tonight and I can't stand up — the room spins and the headache is unbearable when I move.
